# Code and Test

> Code and Test (codeandtest.com) is a full-stack platform combining a social network with real-time chat and 35+ interactive QA practice scenarios designed for learning Playwright end-to-end testing.

## About

Code and Test provides two main experiences:

1. **Social Platform** — Authenticated users can post to streams, chat in real time, follow other users, share images and videos, manage flashcard decks, and play the Test Quest Playwright learning game.
2. **QA Practice** — A free public suite of 35+ interactive UI scenarios covering web inputs, drag-and-drop, iframes, file uploads, alerts, dynamic tables, API testing, WebSocket, virtual scroll, and more — each designed for practising Playwright automation.

## Public Pages

- [Home](https://codeandtest.com/): Platform overview and navigation
- [Sign In / Register](https://codeandtest.com/auth): User authentication
- [QA Practice Hub](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice): Index of all 35+ interactive Playwright practice scenarios
- [Web Inputs](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/web-inputs): Form input automation practice
- [Dynamic Table](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/dynamic-table): Dynamic table interactions
- [Drag and Drop](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/drag-and-drop): Drag-and-drop automation
- [iFrame Handling](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/iframe): iFrame navigation and interaction
- [File Upload](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/file-upload): File upload scenarios
- [Alerts and Modals](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/alerts-modals): Browser alerts and modal dialogs
- [Navigation Patterns](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/navigation): SPA navigation automation
- [API Testing](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/api-testing): REST API request interception and validation
- [WebSocket](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/websocket): Real-time WebSocket interaction testing
- [Form Validation](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/form-validation): Client-side form validation patterns
- [Keyboard Navigation](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/keyboard-nav): Keyboard and accessibility automation
- [Tooltips](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/tooltips): Tooltip hover and display testing
- [Loaders](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/loaders): Loading state and skeleton screen testing
- [Accordion](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/accordion): Expandable accordion component testing
- [Tabs](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/tabs): Tab panel navigation testing
- [Carousel](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/carousel): Image carousel interaction testing
- [Search and Filters](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/search-filters): Search input and filter automation
- [Breadcrumbs](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/breadcrumbs): Breadcrumb navigation testing
- [Context Menu](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/context-menu): Right-click context menu automation
- [Copy to Clipboard](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/copy-clipboard): Clipboard API interaction testing
- [Rating](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/rating): Star rating component automation
- [Wizard / Stepper](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/wizard): Multi-step wizard form testing
- [Infinite Scroll](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/infinite-scroll): Infinite scroll and virtual list testing
- [Sticky Elements](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/sticky-elements): Sticky header and element testing
- [Local Storage](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/local-storage): Browser localStorage read/write testing
- [Cookies](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/cookies): Cookie management and testing
- [Authentication Flow](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/authentication): Login/logout flow automation
- [Download Files](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/download-files): File download verification
- [Notifications](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/notifications): Toast and push notification testing
- [Autocomplete](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/autocomplete): Autocomplete and typeahead testing
- [Multi-Select](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/multi-select): Multi-select dropdown automation
- [Date and Time Picker](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/date-time-picker): Date/time picker interaction
- [Dark Mode](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/dark-mode): Theme switching and dark mode testing
- [Nested Dropdowns](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/nested-dropdowns): Nested menu navigation
- [Error Boundary](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/error-boundary): React error boundary testing
- [Disabled and Readonly](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/disabled-readonly): Disabled and read-only element assertions
- [Progress](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/progress): Progress bar and indicator testing
- [Virtual Scroll](https://codeandtest.com/qa-practice/virtual-scroll): Virtualized list automation

## Protected Pages (require authentication)

- /app/social/*: Social feeds, chat, profiles, photos, videos, notifications, flashcards
- /app/game/*: Test Quest — Playwright learning game with tracks and levels

## Key Facts

- 35+ free interactive Playwright QA practice scenarios, no account required
- Real-time chat and social features powered by Socket.IO and Redis
- Test Quest game teaches Playwright through guided levels and tracks
- Built with React 18, Node.js/Express/TypeScript, MongoDB, Redis, and Bull queues

## Sitemap

https://codeandtest.com/sitemap.xml
